title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in College Point, Queens
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in College Point, Queens. Safe, humane bat control for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Bats roosting in your College Point home or business require immediate professional attention. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive bat removal and exclusion services throughout College Point, ensuring safe, humane removal and permanent prevention. Our licensed technicians use proven methods to protect your property and family from bat infestations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served College Point residents for years with specialized bat removal expertise and deep knowledge of Queens' unique urban wildlife challenges. Our team is fully licensed, insured, and trained in the latest humane exclusion techniques that comply with all New York State wildlife regulations.
localContext: College Point's mix of single-family homes near Poppenhusen Avenue, waterfront properties along the East River, and older residential buildings near St. Fidelis Church provide numerous entry points for bats seeking shelter. The area's proximity to green spaces like College Point Fields and mature tree coverage make bat encounters increasingly common in attics, chimneys, and vents throughout the neighborhood.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have bats in my College Point home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include squeaking or scratching sounds at dusk or dawn, droppings (guano) in attics or near entry points, brown staining around small openings in soffits or siding, and seeing bats flying around your property at sunset. If you notice any of these signs, contact us immediately for an inspection.

faqs.question: Is bat removal in College Point safe and humane?
faqs.answer: Yes. We use exclusion methods that allow bats to leave naturally but prevent them from re-entering. We never trap or harm bats, as they're protected in New York during certain seasons. Our process is completely humane and complies with all state and federal wildlife protection laws.

faqs.question: What does the $900-$2,500 price range cover for bat removal?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on the severity of infestation, number of entry points, and building size. The service includes full inspection, humane bat exclusion, sealing all entry points, attic cleanup if needed, and a warranty. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before any work begins.

faqs.question: How long does bat exclusion take in College Point homes?
faqs.answer: Most bat exclusion projects take 1-3 days for installation, but exclusion devices remain in place for 3-7 days to ensure all bats have exited. After confirming all bats are gone, we permanently seal entry points. The entire process typically takes 1-2 weeks, depending on colony size and weather conditions.
